bridge-type.label: Bosch Thermotechnology Account
bridge-type.description: Represents one SingleKey ID (Bosch/Buderus) login. After adding this bridge, open the URL shown in the "authUrl" configuration parameter in a browser, log in, then paste the resulting redirect URL into the "pasteAuthorizationRedirectUrl" configuration parameter to complete authorization. See ADR-002 for the full flow.

parameter.name: authUrl
parameter.label: Authorization URL
parameter.description: Automatically filled in during initialization. Open this URL in a browser and log in with your Bosch/Buderus account. Empty once authorization is complete.

parameter.name: pasteAuthorizationRedirectUrl
parameter.label: Authorization Redirect URL
parameter.description: One-time setup only: paste the full redirect URL from your browser's address bar here after logging in at SingleKey ID. The value is consumed immediately and never stored.

thing-type.label: Bosch Thermotechnology Gateway
thing-type.description: A single Bosch/Buderus heating gateway, reachable via the PointT cloud API.

parameter.name: gatewayId
parameter.label: Gateway ID
parameter.description: The gateway id assigned by the PointT API. Filled in automatically by discovery.

parameter.name: refreshInterval
parameter.label: Refresh Interval
parameter.description: Interval the gateway's resources are polled, in seconds.

channel-type.label: Outdoor Temperature
channel-type.description: Outdoor temperature reported by the gateway (read-only).

channel-type.label: Manual Room Setpoint
channel-type.description: Manual room setpoint of heating circuit hc1.

channel-type.label: DHW Charge Duration
channel-type.description: Domestic hot water single-charge duration of dhw1.

channel-type.label: DHW Single Charge Setpoint
channel-type.description: Domestic hot water single-charge temperature setpoint of dhw1.

channel-type.label: DHW Operation Mode
channel-type.description: Domestic hot water operation mode of dhw1. The PointT API itself reports/expects the String values "Off"/"Eco+"/"Eco"/"Comfort"/"Auto" - the numeric codes below are a binding-internal mapping onto those Strings, see GatewayHandler.

channel-type.label: Heat Source CH Status
channel-type.description: Raw central heating status reported by the heat source. TODO: confirm the exact value shape (boolean, numeric code, or string) against a live gateway - currently passed through as-is.

channel-type.label: Actual Supply Temperature
channel-type.description: Actual supply (flow) temperature of the heat source.

channel-type.label: Return Temperature
channel-type.description: Return temperature of the heat source.

channel-type.label: Number Of Starts
channel-type.description: Number of times the heat source has started.

channel-type.label: Total Working Time
channel-type.description: Total working time of the heat source. TODO: confirm the reported unit against a live gateway - currently assumed to be hours.

channel-type.label: Active Notifications
channel-type.description: Raw active notifications/faults reported by the gateway, as a JSON string. TODO: confirm the exact response shape against a live gateway and consider splitting into dedicated channels (e.g. a trigger channel per fault) once known.

channel-type.label: DHW Instant Charge
channel-type.description: Starts or stops a domestic hot water instant charge of dhw1.

channel-type.label: DHW Reduce Temperature On Alarm
channel-type.description: Reduces the domestic hot water temperature when an alarm is active.
